notes: Trigger/near-miss prompts for scripts/eval_trigger.py — does the description fire correctly? should_trigger = review/categorize/split intent; near_miss = adjacent intents the skill should NOT grab (raw balance lookups, fetching/importing = expense-fetch's job, unrelated tasks).
should_trigger: review my new transactions and categorize them
how should this charge split between me and Anna?
what does Anna owe me this month?
what did I actually buy on that Amazon charge?
near_miss: fetch my latest transactions from Swedbank
book me a flight to Stockholm
